commands.review_summary:
The PR skips three generated browser bundles in the database-first legacy-store guard and refreshes Codex dynamic-tool prompt snapshots to the current function/namespace protocol shape.

PR surface: Tests +59, Other +14. Total +73 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. At source level, current main scans every `.js` under `extensions` while the bundle generators write the three browser bundle paths there; I did not run local tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the protected maintainer PR is ready for ordinary maintainer review and landing gates.

target.title: fix(ci): skip generated bundles in database guard
target.body:
## Summary

- Exclude only the three browser-only bundles emitted by `bundle-a2ui` and `build-diffs-viewer-runtime` from the database-first legacy-store scan.
- Refresh the six stale Codex runtime prompt snapshots so current Linux CI matches the dynamic-tool namespace protocol.
- Keep ordinary `assets`, `dist`, and runtime source files in the database-state guard.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/check-database-first-legacy-stores.test.ts test/scripts/prompt-snapshots.test.ts` (478 tests)
- Testbox `tbx_01kv9vsvc1trn2pnjqhzey7zt7`: build asset phase emitted bundles; `node scripts/check-database-first-legacy-stores.mjs` passed after that phase; `corepack pnpm prompt:snapshots:check` passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check scripts/check-database-first-legacy-stores.mjs test/scripts/check-database-first-legacy-stores.test.ts test/fixtures/agents/prompt-snapshots/codex-runtime-happy-path`
- Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01kv9vsvc1trn2pnjqhzey7zt7`: `pnpm check:changed` passed all selected lanes.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` (clean, 0.94)

The full Testbox build cannot complete from this sparse GWT mirror because `extensions/clawrouter/*` is absent from the synced checkout after asset generation; that is a testbox sparse-sync defect, not a branch failure. Hosted CI remains required before merge.
target.author: vincentkoc
